narrative:
Precinct Salt Creek (precinct in Muskingum County) has 814 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.5 percentage points.
